# defectdojo_dojo_group (Resource)

DefectDojo Dojo Group

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_dojo_group" "example" {
  name = "Security Team"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Dojo Group

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the Dojo Group

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier
